title: Kaffee's Dual Ride
description: A tiny mod that allows two players to sit on one horse, donkey, mule etc.
body: # Kaffee's Dual Ride This is a tiny mod that allows two players to sit on a horse. It is required on Client and Server. It is licensed under GPLv3. Sourcecode available on [Github](https://github.com/0ql/kaffees_dual_ride). [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kaffees-dual-ride) [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaffees_dual_ride) ## Credits Icon art by [fyoncle](https://www.artstation.com/fyoncle).
